description: Modification of a variable is local to the subshell caused by the pipeline.
A variable was modified in a subshell, so the change may be lost.
Quote command substitution output unless intentional splitting is required.
Do not use variables in the printf format string; use a fixed format.
Double quote array or parameter expansions to avoid re-splitting elements.
Double quote to prevent globbing and word splitting.
Expanding an array without an index only gives the first element.
Argument mixes string and array; keep arguments separate or use the intended expansion.
Variable is referenced but not assigned.
Declare and assign separately to avoid masking return values.
Arrays implicitly concatenate in [[ ]]; compare elements explicitly.
Quote to prevent word splitting/globbing, or split robustly with mapfile/read -a.
